omitted_declarations.policy_reference: When you register with us and use the Application: your full name, email address, username, password, website, links to your social networks (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, etc.), and your biography.
Information you enter into our system when using the Application: such as likes, downloads, artists you follow, and content you interact with.

Crash Logs and Diagnostics: Information related to crashes and performance issues, including device state information, unique device identifiers, and location information, to help diagnose and fix problems. This data is often processed via third-party services like Firebase Crashlytics.
